subject: interesting
body:
Jeffrey   I have some newer light on  your issue  ,   and thought you just 
might have some interest --
Not sure of your whereabouts and thought maybe we could communicate but may  
by e-mail  not so as cool ?    You know the plan is for  US to go the NY  
tomorrow   but i'm not sure if I want to leave  as early bs,  had that epi. 
yesterday and don't want to screw or my  potential progress it up , but the funner 
girl in me wants to go if I can  change    my flight .  Bruce not so positive 
so I'm toying  with crapping out. Don't want to but would like to convey things 
to you for a  start.      Guide me.  please.
 
 
 
Marcia  M

body_html:
Jeffrey   I have some newer light on  your issue ,   and thought you just might have some interest --
Not sure of your whereabouts and thought maybe we could communicate but may by e-mail  not so as cool ?    You know the plan is for US to go the NY  tomorrow   but i'm not sure if I want to leave as early bs,  had that epi. yesterday and don't want to screw or my potential progress it up , but the funner girl in me wants to go if I can change    my flight .  Bruce not so positive so I'm toying with crapping out. Don't want to but would like to convey things to you for a start.      Guide me.  please.
 
 
 
Marcia M
